yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Exploit_for_Path_Traversal_in_TpLink_Tap {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Exploit for Path Traversal in Tp-Link Tapo_C260_Firmware"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-07"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
